title: Photo Shoot Yahoo Japan Reports Live Action Photo shoot
display_title: Photo Shoot Yahoo Japan Reports Live Action Photo shoot
wikitext:
[]: [Photo Shoot] Yahoo! Japan Reports Live-Action Photo-shoot             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:36 pm http://event.yahoo.co.jp/eva2/real/index2.html =3

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 01, 2009 12:40 pm I giggled at Lilith going . But seriously, I'm still hoping that once Rebuild is done, Anno and friends will do a Rebuild take of After the End.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 01, 2009 1:24 pm Live action GNR is so neko kawaii uso sugoi umai neko inu ringo tamago kawaii neko neko neko neko neko ^___^

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Wed Apr 01, 2009 4:21 pm can someone please translate the joke text? this isn't in any way a joke made by Gainax right?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 02, 2009 3:50 am Relevant http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-04-02/2-evangelion/2.0-film-teasers-streamed-by-yahoo-site

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Apr 02, 2009 4:21 am so is this a joke or not....i'm scared

[]:             Quote Post by Twsa'teotu » Thu Apr 02, 2009 2:41 pm The Yahoo! Japan website also began streaming the Yoshimoto version of the original television series' opening sequence as part of its "Eva Live-Action Drama Adaptation Project." The Yoshimoto Gekijō troupe reenacts the opening and other sequences from the anime; the other scenes are available to Yoshimoto Mi-Hōdai Club members only. As a part of its April Fool's Day celebration, Yahoo! held a poll on who fans want to play the Evangelion characters in Brosta TV's live-action drama, but the results are not binding.

[]: Official Live Action Evangelion Photoshoot Underway             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Apr 06, 2009 11:46 pm http://www.sankakucomplex.com/2009/04/06/live-action-evangelion-not-april-fools-after-all/ Side of page may contain NSFW links. The choices are generally quite fitting, especially compared to EVER RE-TAKE.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Apr 06, 2009 11:52 pm Apparently, this is legit: http://www.itmedia.co.jp/news/articles/0904/02/news051.html

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Apr 06, 2009 11:55 pm Ornette wrote: Apparently, this is legit: http://www.itmedia.co.jp/news/articles/0904/02/news051.html

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 07, 2009 12:09 am Wow... Abe is practically a RL dead ringer for Gendo. EDIT: Evidently he's 189cm (6'2") tall, as well. I guess tall Japanese people aren't a myth after all. (This makes me feel much more secure about my random decision to make Akira Katsuragi precisely 189cm long before I ever knew this Abe guy existed.)

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Apr 07, 2009 12:52 am Added a news post on this.

[]:             Quote Post by ArborVitae » Tue Apr 07, 2009 9:06 am Reichu wrote: Wow... Abe is practically a RL dead ringer for Gendo. EDIT: Evidently he's 189cm (6'2") tall, as well. I guess tall Japanese people aren't a myth after all. (This makes me feel much more secure about my random decision to make Akira Katsuragi precisely 189cm long before I ever knew this Abe guy existed.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 07, 2009 1:02 pm So it's not April Fool's after all, huh. Neat. I wonder if this has to do with ADV's/Weta's film or something else.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Tue Apr 07, 2009 1:23 pm http://yoshimoto.fc.yahoo.co.jp/index.php?itemid=178 LOL

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Apr 07, 2009 2:06 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: So it's not April Fool's after all, huh. Neat. I wonder if this has to do with ADV's/Weta's film or something else.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 07, 2009 2:38 pm I see. I was gonna say if it involved acting I have no idea how these people would be qualifications-wise, but I think physically, each person fits perfectly with their respective role. (Ritsuko's actress having a beauty mark is a nice touch.) Stupid question: That would be a guy as Shinji, right? ^^; They have that slightly effeminate look going on, which I greatly approve of.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Apr 07, 2009 2:40 pm Sounds cool and I'm not sure about the Japanese casting since I was hoping this was going to do with the ADV's/Weta's film that Universal Stuidos where going to do back in 2005.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Apr 07, 2009 3:35 pm Lagann wrote: http://yoshimoto.fc.yahoo.co.jp/index.php?itemid=178 LOL

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Apr 07, 2009 3:50 pm
